race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before BOG @ Cheltenham Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner harel du marais (fr) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Gaelic Rambler with 35.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Gaelic Rambler > Non Stop, but actual result was Harel Du Marais (FR) > Gaelic Rambler (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
